headline: Cydcor Earns Verizon's 2025 ACD Wireless Agent of the Year Award
summary: Cydcor recognized by Verizon Partner Network for extraordinary achievement, customer excellence, and commitment to mutual success.Agoura Hills, California--(Newsfile Corp. - April 30, 2026) - Cydcor, a leading provider of outsourced sales solutions, has been honored with the Verizon Partner Network Recognition Program 2025 ACD Wireless Agent of the Year award. This prestigious recognition celebrates Cydcor's extraordinary achievements and its unwavering commitment to customer excellence,...

headline: OXIO Appoints Former Verizon Executive Jeremy Bolton as Chief Commercial Officer to Drive Next Phase of Global Growth
summary: NEW YORK, April 30, 2026--OXIO, a leading Telecom-as-a-Service (TaaS) platform, today announced the appointment of Jeremy Bolton, former Visible and Verizon executive, as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO), as the company enters a new phase of accelerated global growth.

headline: What Apple's new CEO announcement signals ahead of earnings?
summary: Wall Street investors have been abuzz around Apple (AAPL) this past week after CEO Tim Cook announced his plans to depart from the chief executive role this September, handing the reins off to John Ternus. Apple is also expected to report its latest earnings results this Thursday, April 30. Baird senior research analyst of cloud software William Power comes on Market Domination to discuss these headlines making waves ahead of Apple's earnings release.

headline: A Look At Verizon (VZ) Valuation After Strong Q1 Earnings And Subscriber Turnaround
summary: Verizon Communications (VZ) is back in focus after a Q1 update that paired higher adjusted earnings guidance with rare first quarter postpaid phone subscriber gains, a shift that is drawing fresh investor attention. See our latest analysis for Verizon Communications. At a share price of US$46.61, Verizon’s recent Q1 surprise and subscriber momentum sit alongside a 17.08% 90 day share price return. The 12.91% one year total shareholder return points to rebuilding confidence after past...
